name: Mimecast
description: This app integrates with an instance of Mimecast to perform generic, investigative, and containment actions

actions.name: Blocklist Url
actions.description: Adds URL to a managed URL blocklist

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to block

parameters.name: match_type
parameters.description: Set to 'explicit' to block instances of the full URL or set to 'domain' to block any URL with the same domain

parameters.name: enable_log_click
parameters.description: Check to enable click logging

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment to add to the blocked URL

actions.name: Add Member
actions.description: Add a sender or domain to a Mimecast group

parameters.name: member
parameters.description: Domain or Email address of a user to add to a group

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Mimecast ID of the group to add to

actions.name: Remove Member
actions.description: Remove a sender or domain from a Mimecast group

parameters.name: member
parameters.description: Domain or Email address of a user to remove from the group

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Mimecast group ID to remove from

actions.name: Blocklist Sender
actions.description: Blocks a specific sender and recipient in Mimecast

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: The email address of the sender to block

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The email address of the recipient

actions.name: Allowlist Sender
actions.description: Allows a specific sender and recipient in Mimecast

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: The email address of the sender to allow

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The email address of the recipient

actions.name: Allowlist Url
actions.description: Adds URL to a managed URL allowlist

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to allow

parameters.name: match_type
parameters.description: Set to 'explicit' to permit instances of the full URL or set to 'domain' to permit any URL with the same domain

parameters.name: enable_log_click
parameters.description: Check to disable click logging

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment to add to the allowed URL

parameters.name: enable_rewrite
parameters.description: Check to disable domain rewrite

parameters.name: enable_user_awareness
parameters.description: Check to disable user awareness

actions.name: Unblocklist Url
actions.description: Removes URL from a managed URL blocklist

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: URL ID to unblock

actions.name: Unallowlist Url
actions.description: Removes URL from a managed URL allowlist

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: URL ID to remove from the allowlist

actions.name: List Urls
actions.description: Lists all managed URLs from the black/white list

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Max results to return

actions.name: List Groups
actions.description: Lists all Mimecast groups matching the requested search criteria

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to request

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: A string to query for

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: A group source to filter on, either 'cloud' or 'ldap'

actions.name: List Members
actions.description: Lists the members of a specified Mimecast group

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to request

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Mimecast ID of the group to return

actions.name: Find Member
actions.description: Finds a member of a specified Mimecast group

parameters.name: member
parameters.description: The member to find

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The domain or email of the member to find

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Mimecast ID of the group to search

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Get emails across the Mimecast platform

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+0000 (Date and time of the earliest email to track)

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+0000 (Date and time of the latest email to track)

parameters.name: search_reason
parameters.description: Reason for tracking an email

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: The Internet message ID of the message to track

parameters.name: sender_ip
parameters.description: Source IP address of an email to track

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject of an email to track

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Sending email address or domain of the emails to track

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Recipient email address or domain of the emails to track

actions.name: Get Email
actions.description: Returns message information for a tracked email

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Mimecast ID of the email to load

actions.name: Decode Url
actions.description: Decodes URL that was rewritten by Mimecast for on-click protection

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to decode
